name: Duo of Cheeses with Fresh Fruit
recipeInstructions:
1. Spoon yogurt into a strainer lined with cheesecloth.
2. Set the strainer over a bowl and refrigerate for 12 hours.
3. Discard the liquid and measure the yogurt cheese (2 cups).
4. Make the cheeses and refrigerate until serving time.
5. Serve with bread and fresh fruit.
Makes 2 cups plain yogurt cheese.
